title: Shogoukis other job
wikitext:
[]: Shogouki's other job??             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Tue Sep 22, 2009 8:22 pm Either Colonel Sanders is trying to appeal to the cosplay crowd, or a chibi Unit 01 got a part-time job when it's not fighting Angels....

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Sep 22, 2009 8:26 pm KFZ: Kentucky Fried Zeruel.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Sep 22, 2009 8:49 pm Shogouki's other other job??

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Tue Sep 22, 2009 9:02 pm Sammaeloo wrote: KFZ: Kentucky Fried Zeruel.

[]: Re: Shogouki's other job??             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Sep 22, 2009 9:41 pm MatrixRefugee wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 23, 2009 1:58 am Image broken

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Wed Sep 23, 2009 2:12 am Mr. Tines wrote: Image broken

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 23, 2009 3:07 am working now -- the hosting must have had a hiccup.

[]: Re: Shogouki's other job??             Quote Post by Dirty Mick » Wed Sep 23, 2009 6:38 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: I think we may be seeing another step in Khara's guerilla marketing here remember that one weird ad about "Evangelion" apartments or something crazy like that?

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Sep 23, 2009 6:52 pm ^not exactly remember there were these "Evangelion editions" of some apartments spaces in Toyko, one was a "Rei-centric" one, another was "Asuka-centric", etc., and those of us here weren't sure if it was official?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Wed Sep 23, 2009 7:07 pm The apartments were at least in good taste. KFC is never in good taste. It's disgusting. :P

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Sep 23, 2009 7:19 pm But they're surprisingly good in Japan. In fact, a lot of places that, in the states, are considered fast food, is restuarant quality there. Most everything is made to order and usually takes like 5+ minutes before you get your food.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Sep 23, 2009 7:40 pm yeah it's weird, KFC and other fast food places are almost considered "fine dining" in China and India I should note KFC, Burger King, etc., and others often have VERY different menus in places like Japan, China, etc., compared to Europe and North America fish among other seafood, soups/broths, noodles, "interesting" critters seen on Fear Factor for instance are big players oddly enough

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Fri Oct 02, 2009 4:15 pm this is hilarious. they do a similar tactic here for selling new alcoholic beverages or cigarettes or sexual preformance pills...cept since we haven o KFC's here they do it to monuments of our ex presidents an national heroes, or statues of saints or the virgin mary. all fun n good.
summary:
[]: Shogouki's other job??             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Tue Sep 22, 2009 8:22 pm Either Colonel Sanders is trying to appeal to the cosplay crowd, or a chibi Unit 01 got a part-time job when it's not fighting Angels....

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Sep 22, 2009 8:26 pm KFZ: Kentucky Fried Zeruel.
